description:
Collect inventory data and metrics of your hosts and sends it to the New Relic platform.


What's Changed
- fix: remove EOL sles-15.3 and improve provision log visibility in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2254
- core(deps): Bump Go version from 1.26.3 to 1.26.4 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2259 to address CVE-2026-42504, CVE-2026-27145 and CVE-2026-42507
- chore(deps): bump golang.org/x/net to v0.54.0 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2257
- chore(deps): bump newrelic fluent bit output version to 3.6.0 and fluent-bit to 5.0.6 in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2258
- feat(logging): add configurable log endpoint in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2255
- deps: update integration versions in https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/pull/2261 to address CVE-2026-42504, CVE-2026-27145 and CVE-2026-42507
Full Changelog: https://github.com/newrelic/infrastructure-agent/compare/1.76.1...1.76.2
